decisions.rationale: Uses “OTP না গেলে” rather than “না এলে/না পেলে”; it reads like an OTP sending/submission failure, not clearly a not-received case.
Self-contained question about the Postal Vote BD app code not arriving and how to resend it, which matches OTP not received.
Clearly asks what to do if the OTP is not received in Postal Vote BD.
Confirmation code not arriving in the app is a clear OTP/code not received issue.
Asks what to do after not getting the OTP in the Postal Vote BD app; fits the tag intent.
Asks how long to wait when the code does not arrive in the postal vote app, directly about not receiving the OTP/code.
Asks about resend timing when OTP does not arrive, which is within the not-received OTP flow.
Missing the OTP and asking how to get it again is a clear OTP not received/resend scenario.
Asks what action to take when the postal vote app code is not received; fits the tag.
The phrase “রিকোয়েস্ট রিনিউ করব” is awkward and unnatural for OTP resend/re-request, making the row look generated.
Directly asks what step to take if OTP does not arrive in the postal voting app.
Asks whether the OTP can be resent immediately if it does not arrive; cleanly matches the tag.
One-time code not being received in the postal vote service app is clearly an OTP not received issue.
Near-paraphrase of row 53004: both ask what to do if the verification/verify code does not arrive in Postal Vote BD.
Clear self-contained question about the verification code not arriving in Postal Vote BD.
Confirmation SMS not being received is a clear variant of OTP/code not received.
“ওটিপি কনফার্ম কোড” is redundant and awkward hybrid phrasing, making the row look synthetic despite the intended topic.
Asks when to try again if OTP delivery fails; clearly within OTP not received/resend handling.
States OTP is not being received in the postal vote app and asks what to do; clean fit.
SMS code not reaching the user is a clear not-received OTP/code question.
Confirmation code not arriving in the postal vote app and asking what to do matches the tag.
Asks what to do if the OTP is missed; in this context it fits the not-received/resend OTP issue.
Asks how to resolve the issue when the app code does not arrive; clean OTP/code not received intent.
Verification code not received and asking how to request again is directly aligned with OTP not received.

result.packet_rationale: Most rows are self-contained Postal Vote app OTP, verification-code, confirmation-code, or SMS-code not-received questions, including resend or retry timing. I flagged only rows with unclear intent away from receipt failure, a near-duplicate, or unnatural synthetic phrasing.
